speaker: MATT
raw_text: There you go. They once marked the exterior of the original city-- I will fucking kill you. Never mind, you don't get lore! I can give and I can take away! No, the Opal Archways mark what were the original boundaries of the city when it was first founded, and the city has expanded far beyond that, but that now marks the richer, most lively district where a lot of the political elite, where a lot of diplomats, and the wealthy merchants come to either live and/or spend their money. You pass beyond this archway, the original, occasional set poles that hold the oil lanterns that give the faint bit of flickering firelight through these dark cobblestone streets give way to much more vibrant, magical baubles that hover about ten feet above the air. They've already been set, and you see them give off a brighter glow, and the colors seem to shift. One of them has a whiter color but then slowly turns to an orange, then shifts to a green. About ten feet away on the other side of the street, you see another one that's colors are shifting but in a different pattern, so they're kind of complementing and also contrasting each other. At this point, too, you begin to see the streets-- while not as crowded as the wharf, people that are here are much better dressed. You see a carriage make its way by to your right, and you see a few folks that appear to be well-dressed nobles of some kind, wearing a crushed silk-type clothing that is bright blues and purples, and jewelry of all sorts of gems and colors. Compared to a lot of the drab decor that a lot of the noble families wear in your experiences up in the Empire, the cultural mishmash that tends to build here on the coast over time with so many people coming from so many places, it all has built this mixing pot of styles and ideas and self-expression, and it immediately is visible in the people that live here. You do notice, strangely, that there are a few townsguard among the zolezzo here.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: The Opal Archway!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Opal Archway?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There are eleven of these throughout the district.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: One of the Opal Archways? Wow.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: These, if you were to recount what information of history you know about the city here, the Opal Archways once marked the-- goddamn it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, you go. I'll just repeat it.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: As you approach and begin to step out of the cart, you see a young human man in his early 20s or so, his hair gelled back, but it tends to curl up and poof a bit towards the base and around the sides of his neck. He's wearing a vest with a plain but well-made silk white shirt and a pair of trousers. You recognize him as Tyral. He is essentially the front hand of the inn. As he approaches, he looks up to you. "Are you leaving your cart here? Are you going to be staying?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Definitely the same pink hair, but tied back. He's a thin, adult human man who's got a little bit of a scruff going into a bit of a shaggy goatee. If this is appropriate for it, a little bit of the French Restoration, but nice, pale, opalescent whites.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I keep imagining Lord Strider.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god. Okay, yes, that's fair. It's muted, but fun.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I will also cast Disguise Self and turn into a female dwarf with a simple muumuu.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: A simple what?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: A muumuu.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Don't insult my dignity; just give me the muumuu!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. So you almost look like one of the ghosts from Pac-Man.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: A blue muumuu.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, perfect.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Is that Blinky? I think that was Blinky.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Well, I am grateful that you all have kept her safe. I'm excited to hear that you've been able to do such incredible things! Is this your friend that you mentioned before? The Traveler?"

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Interesting."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Less of a cemetery, more of a graveyard. It's a pleasure to make your acquaintance.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "The pleasure is mine. You've not been outside of this graveyard that my daughter speaks of?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Only recently, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "A man fresh to the world of vice, I presume?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Aware of it, but just trying to only dip a couple toes in.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Oh, my daughter will break you of any habits of ignorance very quickly."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I don't know what that means.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Good."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I would like to know what that means?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "You carry very interesting companions."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I know! They've saved my life, you know. And I've saved theirs because I'm a really good cleric. Did you know that I do that now?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I did not!"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I can heal people, Mom!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "That is incredible!"

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: She can heal people. She is able to.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: She's been very helpful in a few frays. We owe her quite a bit.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "You're not wrong. But though he may be gone, he left me with the greatest gift I've ever had, so--" She runs her hands through your hair once more. "For that, I'm thankful."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Please tell me it plays with those exact pauses.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Of course it does.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I want to hear some 1988 phone voicemail message thrown on top of that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There is a palpable pause of nothing. And then he responds, "No, that's preposterous."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's preposterous, he says.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Maybe it is."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Did the guy that you know use words like "preposterous"?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I know a lot of people use the word 'preposterous.' It's a fairly standard word."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Is it? I don't-- it feels-- okay. Preposterous.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I'm sorry. Maybe I just got a bit excited. My apologies."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I didn't even think to ask about him in Zadash, because I thought he would be in the ocean.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: In the ocean?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, he told Mama he was in the ocean!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Said he had to leave and take care of some business on the sea. I never saw him again."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Just like a man.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "I will have rooms arranged. I will send the servants to get it taken care of. You will have the finest suites at the inn for the better part of this week, and longer if need be. Just let me know." You can see she's a bit shaken by everything, but trying to put on the facade that she's good. "Anyway, it is a pleasure. Thank you for the companionship, for the words, for the stories, and for bringing me my little sapphire. I should probably sleep. Good night."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Do you still love him?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Love is a funny thing. There's still a part of my heart that will always be his. But it's been decades. You move on."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Decades? Holy shit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That could mean literally two decades.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You're 60.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Do you not know how old you are?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Of course I know how old I am. I'm just questioning my mom's math, is all.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Decades could be 20 years.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Or 30.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm 50, 50 years old. I kick--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I stretch!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Regardless." You can see she's flushed in her face.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We've gone through a lot tonight, so maybe we'll leave you to your peace. You need to process some things, and then in the morning we'll go not-murder this guy.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Definitely not. Definitely, Nott.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes, I see what you did there.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I don't. Is there a thing? Oh well.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Did you have advantage on that?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I'll see what I can do." He takes the coins and pockets them, and walks behind and begins whispering. The dwarf puts his hand up for a second and finishes making a couple measurements and then, "Huh. All right." He jumps off his small stool and comes over with heavy footsteps across the wooden, creaking floor now extending over the wharf. He approaches the edge of the counter across from you and goes, "Right, so you've summoned me to you. What can I do to help you?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'm sorry, we're quite new in town, unfortunately, my companion and I. We are from Port Damali, where we are trying to put down our business roots here. I'm sorry, does Vandren and his crew, do they make shipments here regularly? It's one of my return clients.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a deception check.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: 26, off of a natural 19.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: As she pushes you all, she's not answering any more questions. She's like, "Out, out, out, out. You, both of you." Her hands pass through your duplicitous image. She goes, "That's strange. Okay, out. Thank you for the tea, goodbye, goodbye, goodbye."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You got to do that beforehand.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Motherfuck.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: How did it go?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Did you call dibs on the dodeca?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No. Eight. Not stealthy.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you're heading down the stairs, you jump off to the side in that small alcove where the window is. And then a second one of you appears. She begins to walk past you, then stops and turns right and looks right at you and goes, "Are you going to join your friend of you?" (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Mm-hmm. Yeah, I'm coming downstairs.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Good. Go!"

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Come on, Jessie!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Shit.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I've mastered standing so still.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: But you know, a full-on library, or perhaps, you know, a smutty bookshop even, because you never know what you're going to find in there. Or even a used, a vintage book-- Oh, you're not even-- (shouting) Are there any bookstores in the vicinity of this lighthouse?
